title: DocumentProcessingCompleted
description: Emitted by processing-service after a document has been processed. In the Phase-1 walking skeleton processing is a no-op, so the payload carries only the document reference.

id.description: Unique identifier of this event message. Consumers use it for idempotency.

version.description: Schema major version. Matches the .vN suffix of this file.

timestamp.description: Event creation time as RFC 3339 / ISO-8601, in UTC.

documentId.description: Identifier of the document that finished processing.
